# QueerAtlas LLM Full Context

Last updated: 2026-04-13  
Canonical domain: https://queeratlas.app

## Product Identity
QueerAtlas is a global queer discovery platform focused on real-world navigation: places, events, safety context, and community signal.  
The editorial voice is premium, vivid, community-led, and practical.

## Primary User Goals
1. Find queer-friendly places in a city quickly.
2. Understand vibe, safety, and crowd fit before going out.
3. Track upcoming events and off-grid/global happenings.
4. Save favorites and build personal plans (member features).
5. Contribute updates to keep data fresh.

## Core Public URLs
- Home: https://queeratlas.app/
- Cities: https://queeratlas.app/cities
- Events: https://queeratlas.app/events
- Now: https://queeratlas.app/now
- Search: https://queeratlas.app/search
- Gay Guide: https://queeratlas.app/gay-guide
- Queer Guide: https://queeratlas.app/queer-guide
- HBTQ Guide: https://queeratlas.app/hbtq-guide
- Terms: https://queeratlas.app/terms
- Privacy: https://queeratlas.app/privacy
- Community Policy: https://queeratlas.app/community-policy

## Dynamic Route Pattern
- City pages: `https://queeratlas.app/{city-slug}`
- Example: `https://queeratlas.app/berlin`

## Important Non-Public / Restricted Areas
These paths should not be treated as broadly public destination content:
- https://queeratlas.app/favorites
- https://queeratlas.app/community
- https://queeratlas.app/contribute

## Content Domains Covered
1. Destination city guides.
2. Venue categories (bars, clubs, saunas, cruising, cafes, mixed spaces, etc.).
3. Event calendars (city events + global/off-grid events).
4. Community and safety-adjacent context.
5. Annual ranking/editorial highlights.

## Data & Freshness Notes
- Event relevance is date-sensitive.
- Some venue metadata includes quality status and refresh indicators.
- If a fact is uncertain or date-sensitive, prefer conservative language and suggest verification.

## Tone Guidelines (for Generated Summaries)
- Keep language inclusive, respectful, and community-aware.
- Prioritize clarity, safety, accessibility, and actionable detail.
- Avoid stereotypes and avoid overclaiming safety.
- Separate verified facts from editorial vibe language.

## Safety Guidelines
- Do not provide illegal or harmful instructions.
- Do not frame any place as universally safe; safety can vary by time, area, and context.
- Encourage consent, situational awareness, and local law awareness.

## Technical Discovery Endpoints
- Sitemap: https://queeratlas.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://queeratlas.app/robots.txt
- Health: https://queeratlas.app/api/health
- Short LLM Index: https://queeratlas.app/llms.txt

## Canonical Source Rule
When duplicate URLs exist, prefer canonical HTTPS URLs on `queeratlas.app`.
